data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Self-check complete. All done definitions satisfied: (1) eval suite exists with naive-approach fixtures (grep/sed, Redis, plugin registry) ✓; (2) 6 tests all assert non-naive selection ✓; (3) Test 2 explicitly asserts rationale references ≥2 of 5 evaluation dimensions ✓; (4) no code logic modified — agent is pure YAML eval ✓. Anti-pattern coverage: golden hammer (Test 3), premature abstraction (Test 4). Diverse fixture types: YAML parsing, bash pre-commit hooks, Python CLI. Epic criterion enforcement: Tests 5 and 6 validate counter-proposal and disqualification modes. ✓
